summary: Two pillar blocks sit to the sides while a central shared proof zone connects them through one chart, scorecard, or common rationale layer.
composition_pattern: side pillars with central shared proof core
support_structure: central shared proof or rationale core
when_to_use: The page needs to show how both pillars create one combined effect
A shared proof block should unify the two strategies
avoid_when: The pillars should stay fully separate
The page has no credible shared proof core
